ns0:entry.ns0:title: Anxcye/anx-reader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Anxcye/anx-reader
Language: dart
Featuring powerful AI capabilities and supporting various e-book formats, it makes reading smarter and more focused.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AppFlowy-IO/AppFlowy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AppFlowy-IO/AppFlowy
Language: dart
Bring projects, wikis, and teams together with AI. AppFlowy is the AI collaborative workspace where you achieve more without losing control of your data. The leading open source Notion alternative.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: BasedHardware/omi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BasedHardware/omi
Language: dart
AI wearables. Put it on, speak, transcribe, automatically

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Chevey339/kelivo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Chevey339/kelivo
Language: dart
A Flutter LLM Chat Client. Support Mobile & Desktop.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Yubico/yubioath-flutter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Yubico/yubioath-flutter
Language: dart
Yubico Authenticator for Desktop (Windows, macOS and Linux) and Android

ns0:entry.ns0:title: academind/flutter-complete-guide-course-resources
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/academind/flutter-complete-guide-course-resources
Language: dart
Course resources (code snapshots & slides) for our complete Flutter & Dart course (https://acad.link/flutter).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: astubenbord/paperless-mobile
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/astubenbord/paperless-mobile
Language: dart
An (almost) fully fledged mobile paperless client.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cfug/dio
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cfug/dio
Language: dart
A powerful HTTP client for Dart and Flutter, which supports global settings, Interceptors, FormData, aborting and canceling a request, files uploading and downloading, requests timeout, custom adapters, etc.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: duobaseio/forui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/duobaseio/forui
Language: dart
Duobase's Flutter UI library

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/firebase/flutterfire
Language: dart
🔥 A collection of Firebase plugins for Flutter apps.

URL: https://github.com/flutter/genui
Language: dart

ns0:entry.ns0:title: flutter/packages

URL: https://github.com/flutter/packages
Language: dart
A collection of useful packages maintained by the Flutter team

ns0:entry.ns0:title: flutter/samples
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/flutter/samples
Language: dart
A collection of Flutter examples and demos

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hiddify/hiddify-app
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hiddify/hiddify-app
Language: dart
Multi-platform auto-proxy client, supporting Sing-box, X-ray, TUIC, Hysteria, Reality, Trojan, SSH etc. It’s an open-source, secure and ad-free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: juliansteenbakker/mobile_scanner
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/juliansteenbakker/mobile_scanner
Language: dart
A universal Flutter barcode and QR code scanner using CameraX/ML Kit for Android, AVFoundation/Apple Vision for iOS & macOS, and ZXing for web.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kodjodevf/mangayomi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kodjodevf/mangayomi
Language: dart
Free and open source application for reading manga, novels, and watching animes available on Android, iOS, macOS, Linux and Windows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rrousselGit/riverpod
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rrousselGit/riverpod
Language: dart
A reactive caching and data-binding framework. Riverpod makes working with asynchronous code a breeze.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: shorebirdtech/shorebird

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ycccccccy/wx_key
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ycccccccy/wx_key
Language: dart
获取微信4.0版本以上数据库密钥和图片密钥的工具 | A tool for obtaining database keys and image keys for WeChat versions 4.0 and above
